description_long: This object is a flat, rectangular surface with stylized, embossed text arranged in various orientations across its face. The text appears to be rendered in a decorative, Gothic or Old English font, with some words highlighted in blue and others in a pinkish hue. The surface itself has a smooth, gradient coloration transitioning from a warm tan to a muted purple, giving it a visually striking appearance. There are no visible three-dimensional features or components typical of a rifle, such as a barrel, stock, or trigger. The object is entirely planar, lacking any protrusions or mechanical parts. Its overall form and detailing suggest it is more of a decorative or graphic element rather than a functional weapon.
description: A flat, rectangular surface with embossed, colorful Gothic text and a smooth gradient background. No visible rifle features or mechanical parts are present.
description_view_0: The surface shows blue and pink Gothic text arranged in an L-shape, with the gradient background transitioning from tan to purple.
description_view_1: The text is more prominent in the foreground, with the blue and pink hues standing out against the gradient surface.
description_view_2: The embossed text appears reversed and mirrored, emphasizing the flatness and decorative nature of the object.
description_view_3: The text is densely packed in the lower left, with the gradient background more visible in the upper right.
